mapper.select:
SELECT item.ITEM_NO AS itemNo , item.ITEM_NAME AS itemName , MAX(io.PRICE) AS price , img.IMG_URL AS imgUrl , COUNT(DISTINCT od.ORDER_NO) AS orderCount FROM OMS.ITEM item
JOIN OMS.ITEM_CATEGORY_MAPPING icm ON icm.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO
LEFT JOIN OMS.ITEM_OPTION_GROUP iog ON iog.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO
LEFT JOIN OMS.ITEM_OPTION io ON io.GROUP_NO = iog.GROUP_NO
LEFT JOIN OMS.ITEM_IMAGES img ON img.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO AND img.PRIMARY_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN OMS.ORDER_DETAIL od ON od.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO
WHERE icm.CATEGORY_NO IN ( SELECT CATEGORY_NO FROM OMS.ITEM_CATEGORY_MAPPING WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ) AND item.ITEM_NO != #{itemNo} AND item.ITEM_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND item.DELETED_DT IS NULL
GROUP BY item.ITEM_NO , item.ITEM_NAME , img.IMG_URL
ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT item.ITEM_NO AS itemNo , item.ITEM_NAME AS itemName , MAX(ITOP.PRICE) AS price , item.ITEM_STATUS AS itemStatus , img.IMG_URL AS imgUrl , CASE WHEN item.CREATED_DT >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), '%Y%m%d') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isNew , COUNT(DISTINCT ORD.ORDER_NO) AS orderCount , COUNT(DISTINCT ITRV.REVIEW_NO) AS reviewCount
FROM OMS.ITEM item
LEFT JOIN OMS.ITEM_OPTION_GROUP ITOG ON ITOG.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO
LEFT JOIN OMS.ITEM_OPTION ITOP ON ITOP.GROUP_NO = ITOG.GROUP_NO
LEFT JOIN OMS.ITEM_IMAGES img ON img.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO AND img.PRIMARY_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN OMS.ORDER_DETAIL ORDE ON ORDE.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO
LEFT JOIN OMS.`ORDER` ORD ON ORD.ORDER_NO = ORDE.ORDER_NO AND ORD.ORDER_STATUS = 'PAID'
LEFT JOIN OMS.ITEM_CATEGORY_MAPPING ITCP ON ITCP.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO
LEFT JOIN OMS.ITEM_REVIEW ITRV ON ITRV.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO
WHERE item.ITEM_STATUS IN ('ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE') AND item.ITEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
AND ITCP.CATEGORY_NO IN
#{no}
GROUP BY item.ITEM_NO , item.ITEM_NAME , item.ITEM_STATUS , img.IMG_URL , item.CREATED_DT
ORDER BY price ASC ORDER BY orderCount DESC ORDER BY item.CREATED_DT DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET ${(page - 1) * size}
